title: Craziness Awakened (Orespawn Remake)
description: This mod bring lots of unique weapons, items, and mobs to your minecraft, Aswell as acts as orespawns succesor!
body:
Crucial Info :
Craziness Awakened is an orespawn succsesor/remake NOT A PORT.  Right now as it stands 

Craziness Awakened Is still in its Alpha Stages. Right now the mod does not have everything the original
orespawn had, however in Release stages it will have everything the original mod had aswell as more.

FAQ.

Q: When is the next update?

A: No one knows.


Q: When is ***blank*** Getting added?

A: When It Does.


Q: Will everything be in the mod from the og orespawn

A: Yes except for girlfriends

Q: Will this mod be ported to Insert version?

A: This mod will be updated with every version after 1.20.1, As for other versions it is unlikely
however we may port to 1.16.5 and even more unlikely 1.12.2, As for version ports.
a bedrock port is possible however unlikely.

Current Additions In The Mod
 

Right now the mod as many things that were in the original orespawn aswell as many new things.
as of version 4.1 there are.


-60+ Mobs
-71+Tools and Weapons
-14 Sets Of Armor
-55+ Unique Items And Boss Drops
-128+ Unique Blocks
-48+ Unique Foodstuffs
 

And So Much More!
 

Incompatabilities And Problems
This mod doesnt have that many incompatabilities. However some are very
annoying and troublesome however we are working to fix them.

Some of these mods are Jujutsucraft Like Mods with 100s of mobs some times mess with spawn conditions
Biome mods also rarely mess with spawn conditions of certain mobs however the mod is still playable. Many mcreator mods may cause lag.
 

Dependencies And Our links
This Mod has 3 Dependencies being

GECKOLIB
PEHKUI
ATRIBUTEFIX
